one_line_verdict: A crowd-pleasing MMA comeback story powered by Russell Crowe's grit — worth a theater visit for action and sports drama fans, but casual viewers can safely wait for streaming.
english_note: Straightforward dialogue, standard Australian/American accents, minimal jargon beyond basic MMA terms.
credits_detail: No mid/post-credits scene (speculative — no confirmed reports of one).
one_line_summary: Russell Crowe throws one last punch in this raw, redemption-fueled MMA thriller.
